---
title: "Space Matrix"
author: "Meta Berghauser Pont and Per Haupt"
description: "Bridging the gap between abstract urban planning and the actual physical performance of city blocks"
categories: [density, quantitative, typology construction, urban fabric, map based, data based, form, type, composition]
date-format: "YYYY"
date: "2010"
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

## Why use this method? 


## You are ready to use this method if


## Questions you can answer 


## Steps
### density {#density}
### FSI {#fsi}
### GSI {#gsi}
### OSR {#osr}
### L {#l}


## Tools

## Cases


## References

## Exercises
### Exercise 1
